final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial lifestyle photo, warm family scene
Primary request: a heartwarming Chinese family reunion dinner around a round table with hot pot, everyone raising glasses and laughing together
Scene/backdrop: cozy home dining room, background wall covered with framed family photos and printed snapshots
Subject: a multigenerational family seated around a traditional Chinese round table, smiling and toasting with glasses raised; steaming hot pot at the center of the table with various ingredients; dishes and chopsticks spread across the table
Style/medium: photorealistic, warm lifestyle photography
Composition/framing: medium wide shot, eye-level angle, full table visible with family members around it
Lighting/mood: warm amber pendant light overhead, soft golden glow filling the room, intimate and joyful atmosphere, full of everyday warmth and happiness
Color palette: warm golden yellow, deep red accents, rich browns of wooden furniture, soft skin tones
Materials/textures: steam wisps rising from hot pot broth, glossy lacquered round table surface, matte wall with layered photo prints, fabric clothing textures
Constraints: keep the round table and hot pot as the visual center; wall of family photos clearly visible in background; no empty seats
Avoid: cold or blue-toned lighting, sterile restaurant setting, stiff or posed expressions, watermark
